title: Template inheritance
excerpt:
Hi evrybody ! 
Does a board created from a template retain its inheritance ? Are structural modifications made to the template reflected in the board created from it ?

posts.author: stephane.degaillande (Stéphane de GAILLANDE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi evrybody !
Does a board created from a template retain its inheritance ? Are structural modifications made to the template reflected in the board created from it ?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @stephane.degaillande ,

Sure!
When you create a board from a template in Monday.com, it’s like making a copy. The new board starts out the same as the template, but it doesn’t stay linked to it. So, if you change the template later, those changes won’t automatically happen in the boards you’ve already made. You’ll need to update each board separately if you want to apply the changes.

posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your very clear feedback.
